ae_daily_trend.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  {{DATE_DIMENSION}} AS metric_date,
  SUM(active_users) AS active_users,
  SUM(session_count) AS session_count,
  SUM(payers) AS payers,
  SUM(gross_revenue) AS gross_revenue
FROM analytics_serving.gameops.ae_daily_secure
WHERE game_code = :game_code
  AND metric_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
  {{REGION_FILTER}}
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

ae_segment_mix.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  {{DIMENSION_SQL}} AS segment_key,
  SUM(active_users) AS active_users,
  SUM(payers) AS payers,
  SUM(gross_revenue) AS gross_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(gross_revenue) / NULLIF(SUM(payers), 0), 2) AS arppu
FROM analytics_serving.gameops.ae_segment_secure
WHERE game_code = :game_code
  AND metric_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
  {{REGION_FILTER}}
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY gross_revenue DESC

ae_retention_health.sqlTemplate:
SELECT
  cohort_date,
  d1_retention,
  d7_retention,
  d30_retention
FROM analytics_serving.gameops.ae_retention_secure
WHERE game_code = :game_code
  AND cohort_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
  {{REGION_FILTER}}
ORDER BY cohort_date
